chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D- 2094 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No.11850/2021 (Urgency). 2. For order on office objection No.18. 3. For order on CMA No.9034/2021. 4. For order on CMA No.9035/2021. 5. For hearing of main case. 23.4.2021 Syed Mureed Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner. ----------------------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. To be complied with within a week’s time. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. Through instant petition, the petitioner has impugned the rejection letters dated 17.1.2020 and 20.2.2020 issued by respondent No.6 on the ground that petitioner has not submitted Post Graduate Diploma in Archaeology or Museology from recognized University. Per learned counsel, the petitioner has requisite qualification and experience for the subject post and the decision of the respondent / Sindh public Service Commission is erroneous and nullity in the eyes of law. He relied upon the statement dated 03.4.2021 and submitted that the petitioner fulfills all the conditions as mentioned in the advertisement as such the rejection letters have erroneously been issued just to knockout the petitioner from selection. Let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned Advocate General, Sindh for 31.05.2021. J U D G E J U D G E Zahid/*
